senses.definition_dg: Tezi ndide za mwiri zinazosaidia kupigana na makongo.

examples.dg: Ngai zinaifura mutu achikala mkongo.
examples.en: Lymph nodes swell when a person is sick.
examples.sw: Tezi zinavimba mtu anapokuwa mgonjwa.

equivalents_en: thickly woven basket used to hold water
equivalents_sw: aina ya kikapu kizito kinachotumiwa kuwekea maji

senses.definition_en: thickly woven basket used to hold water
senses.definition_sw: aina ya kikapu kizito kinachotumiwa kuwekea maji
senses.definition_dg: Chikapu chizito chirichofumwa kpwa ukali ili chiweze kushikira madzi.

examples.dg: Ngaito yaodzazwa madzi kula kisimani.
examples.en: The woven basket was filled with water from the well.
examples.sw: Kikapu kilicho cha maji kilijazwa maji kutoka kisimani.

senses.definition_dg: Angaliya ngarawa.

examples.dg: Ngalawa za Adigo zinahumirwa kpwenye bahari.
examples.en: Digo outrigger canoes are used on the sea.
examples.sw: Ngalawa za Wadigo hutumiwa baharini.

senses.definition_dg: Baraza ya azehe anaohukumu mambo ga mudzi.

examples.dg: Proverb: Msema ngambi siye mngambi
examples.en: A person who speaks in the council isn't necessarily a council member
examples.sw: Baraza la wazee liliamua jambo hilo.

senses.definition_dg: Angaliya ngekewa.

examples.dg: Nganja ni chinyama cha tsakani chinahumirwa ni aganga.
examples.en: The nganja is a forest animal used by traditional healers.
examples.sw: Nganja ni mnyama wa msituni anayetumiwa na waganga.

equivalents_en: traditional dance performed using dried pods of the mbambakofi

senses.definition_en: traditional dance performed using dried pods of the mbambakofi
senses.definition_dg: Ngoma ya chienyeji inayochezwa kpwa kuhumira makufu makavu ya mbambakofi.

examples.dg: Nganja ni ngoma ya kare ambayo bado inachezwa.
examples.en: The nganja is an ancient dance that is still performed.
examples.sw: Nganja ni ngoma ya zamani ambayo bado inachezwa.

sub_entries.definition_sw: aina ya ngoma ambapo mbegu za mbambakofi hutumiwa

senses.definition_dg: Hadithi, fumbo au ndarira inayosimuriwa.

examples.dg: Hadisi na ngano ikasira na hipho
examples.en: That's the end of the story
examples.sw: Bibi aliwaambia watoto ngano usiku.

senses.definition_dg: Chombo cha kudzirinda nacho wakati wa viha.

examples.dg: Askari washika ngao na fumo.
examples.en: The warrior held a shield and a spear.
examples.sw: Askari alishika ngao na mkuki.

equivalents_en: how many? ngapi? Agreement: Atu angaphi? Mizigo mingaphi? Maembe mangaphi? Vyala vingaphi? Nazi ngaphi?

senses.definition_en: how many? ngapi? Agreement: Atu angaphi? Mizigo mingaphi? Maembe mangaphi? Vyala vingaphi? Nazi ngaphi?
senses.definition_dg: Neno ra kuuza chiasi; ni angaphi?

examples.dg: Atu angaphi akpwedza phano?
examples.en: How many people came here?
examples.sw: Watu wangapi walikuja hapa?

senses.definition_dg: Chombo cha kuvukira bahari chirichochongwa kula muhi na kukala na papi za uphande.

examples.dg: Ngarawa ya mvuvi inasafiri baharini.
examples.en: The fisherman's outrigger canoe is sailing on the sea.
examples.sw: Ngalawa ya mvuvi inasafiri baharini.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kulala au kuangaliya uso dzulu.

examples.dg: Mwanache walala ngari.
examples.en: The child lay face up.
examples.sw: Mtoto alilala uso juu.

sub_entries.definition_en: to sleep or lie on one's back
to swim on one's back, to do backstroke

equivalents_en: kuhenda/kufanya to administer or apply first aid to a person prior

senses.definition_en: , kuhenda/kufanya to administer or apply first aid to a person prior
senses.definition_dg: Msada wa kpwandza unaohewa mutu kabla ya kuphiya hospitalini.

examples.dg: Wamuhenda ngata kabla ya kumphirikira hospitalini.
examples.en: They gave him first aid before taking him to the hospital.
examples.sw: Walimpa msaada wa kwanza kabla ya kumpeleka hospitalini.

sub_entries.definition_sw: kuagua mtu kabla ya ramli ama uganga

equivalents_en: red-brown striped or spotted lizard with a red tail which moves very quickly. The withered tails of this lizard are commonly found on footpaths
equivalents_sw: it is believed that if the tail is buried along with a type of red ant (mwalikuni or pambo) this will cause people to fight in that place; aina ya mjusi mdogo anayetembea kwa kasi kuliko aina nyingine

senses.definition_en: red-brown striped or spotted lizard with a red tail which moves very quickly. The withered tails of this lizard are commonly found on footpaths
senses.definition_sw: it is believed that if the tail is buried along with a type of red ant (mwalikuni or pambo) this will cause people to fight in that place; aina ya mjusi mdogo anayetembea kwa kasi kuliko aina nyingine
senses.definition_dg: Aina ya mjusi mdide wa rangi ya kundu-kahawia wenye mkia wa kundu, anayeenyendeka kpwa kasi sana.

examples.dg: Ngate aruka kpwa kasi, huwezi kumgbwira.
examples.en: The red lizard runs fast, you cannot catch it.
examples.sw: Ngate anakimbia kwa kasi, huwezi kumkamata.

senses.definition_dg: Chombo cha kupandzira au kushereyera kutsi kpwa kuikira magulu kahi ya fito.

examples.dg: Pandza ngazi uphiye dzulu ya nyumba.
examples.en: Climb the ladder and go to the top of the house.
examples.sw: Panda ngazi uende juu ya nyumba.

equivalents_en: piece of ground which has been cleared for cultivation

senses.definition_en: piece of ground which has been cleared for cultivation
senses.definition_dg: Phatu phenye kutsahwa ili pharimwe.

examples.dg: Baba waandza ngbwe kpwa kuphanda muhogo.
examples.en: Father cleared a plot for planting cassava.
examples.sw: Baba aliandaa shamba kwa kupanda muhogo.

equivalents_en: base of the tail (used of birds)

senses.definition_en: base of the tail (used of birds)
senses.definition_dg: Seemu ya mwandzo wa mkia, hasa ya nyuni.

examples.dg: Nyuni ana manyoya manji phatu pha ngbwidi.
examples.en: The bird has many feathers at the base of the tail.
examples.sw: Ndege ana manyoya mengi sehemu ya koo ya mkia.

senses.definition_dg: Jiwe ridide na ngumu sana.

examples.dg: Anache anaimba kpwa ngedye za muho.
examples.en: The children play with hard pebbles from the river.
examples.sw: Watoto wanacheza na vijiwe vidogo kutoka mtoni.

equivalents_en: small mammal. Tradition states that when this animal dies all the other forest creatures come to the body to pay their respects
equivalents_sw: consequently traditional healers use the skin of this animal as a charm

senses.definition_en: small mammal. Tradition states that when this animal dies all the other forest creatures come to the body to pay their respects
senses.definition_sw: consequently traditional healers use the skin of this animal as a charm
senses.definition_dg: Aina ya chinyama kidide cha tsakani ambacho chinapholaga vinyama vyosi vya tsakani vinakpwedza kuchiomboleya.

examples.dg: Aganga ahumira ngozi ya ngekewa kpwa dawa.
examples.en: Traditional healers use the skin of the ngekewa for medicine.
examples.sw: Waganga hutumia ngozi ya ngekewa kwa dawa.

sub_entries.definition_en: msitu huja pamoja kutoa heshima zao

equivalents_en: ngondo kienyeji hutumia ngozi y ya mnyama huyu kwa kuvutia wateja na wapenzi

senses.definition_en: ngondo kienyeji hutumia ngozi y ya mnyama huyu kwa kuvutia wateja na wapenzi
senses.definition_dg: Chinyama kidide cha tsakani ambacho ngozi yake inahumirwa ni aganga kuvutira atu.

examples.dg: Ngephephe inahumirwa ni aganga kpwa dawa za kuvutira wateja.
examples.en: The ngephephe is used by healers for charms to attract customers.
examples.sw: Ngephephe hutumiwa na waganga kwa dawa za kuvutia wateja.

senses.definition_dg: Aina ya chombo cha muziki chenye nyuzi.

examples.dg: Ngephephe inapigwa dza gitaa.
examples.en: The ngephephe is played like a guitar.
examples.sw: Ngephephe hupigwa kama gita.

senses.definition_en: hardship, period before the harvest when food is scarce
senses.definition_sw: shida, wakati kabla ya mvuno ambapo chakula kinakosekana
senses.definition_dg: Wakati wa shida kabla ya mavuno ambapo chakurya ni chache.

examples.dg: Wakati wa ngerye atu anateswa ni ndzala.
examples.en: During the lean season people suffer from hunger.
examples.sw: Wakati wa ngerye watu wanateswa na njaa.

equivalents_en: tightly (e.g. a knot that has been tied)

senses.definition_en: tightly (e.g. a knot that has been tied)
senses.definition_dg: Kpwa kukaza sana, hasa kamba au chifungo.

examples.dg: Funga ngi ili chisivuguke.
examples.en: Tie it tightly so it doesn't come loose.
examples.sw: Funga sana ili kisifunguke.

senses.definition_dg: Kpwa kukaza sana, zaidi ya ngi.

examples.dg: Baba akafunga tupa ngi-ngi-ngi na vi sambi mayo kaweza kuvugula
examples.en: Father closed the jar very tightly and now mother can't open it
examples.sw: Baba alifunga mfuko kwa nguvu sana.

senses.definition_dg: Kpwa kukala phephi-phephi sana, kuno chitu na chitu chikagusana.

examples.dg: Baba waphanda matsere ngi-ngi-ngi
examples.en: Father has planted the maize very close together
examples.sw: Baba alipanda mahindi karibu karibu sana.

senses.definition_dg: Mstari wa mwisho wa nyere chitwani.

examples.dg: Kinyozi wamnyola ngilishi nono.
examples.en: The barber trimmed his hairline nicely.
examples.sw: Kinyozi alimnyoa laini ya nywele vizuri.

senses.definition_dg: Ukongo ambapo seemu ya ndani ya mwiri inatuluka kupitira tundu.

examples.dg: Ngiri inatswa mutu achikala na utsungu wa ndani.
examples.en: A hernia causes pain in the abdomen.
examples.sw: Ngiri inauma mtu anapokuwa na maumivu ya ndani.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya atu ario phamwenga wakati wosi, kusotengana.

examples.dg: Atu airi ao ni ngiri-ngiri, kuona mmwenga ni kuona wanjine.
examples.en: Those two are inseparable, to see one is to see the other.
examples.sw: Watu wawili hao ni ngiri-ngiri, kumwona mmoja ni kumwona mwingine.

senses.definition_dg: Kufunga kamba kpwa kukaza sana.

examples.dg: Ngirita kamba iyo vizuri.
examples.en: Tie that rope tightly.
examples.sw: Funga kamba hiyo kwa nguvu.

senses.definition_dg: Kutunda matunda kula muhini.

examples.dg: Anache akaangobola maembe kula muhini.
examples.en: The children picked mangoes from the tree.
examples.sw: Watoto walichuma maembe kutoka mtini.

equivalents_en: matso to close eyes and look away in scorn

senses.definition_en: matso to close eyes and look away in scorn
senses.definition_dg: Kufunga matso na kuangaliya uphande wanjine kpwa dharau.

examples.dg: Wangobola matso kpwa dharau.
examples.en: She closed her eyes and looked away in scorn.
examples.sw: Alikonyeza macho kwa dharau.

equivalents_en: type of small fish with a spiny back

senses.definition_en: type of small fish with a spiny back
senses.definition_dg: Aina ya samaki mdide wa mwibani wenye miiba mgongoni.

examples.dg: Ngogo ni samaki mdide ela ana miiba minji.
examples.en: The ngogo is a small fish but it has many spines.
examples.sw: Ngogo ni samaki mdogo lakini ana miiba mingi.

equivalents_en: place where two branches of a tree rub together
equivalents_sw: sehemu ambayo matawi ya mti hukwaruzana

senses.definition_en: place where two branches of a tree rub together
senses.definition_sw: sehemu ambayo matawi ya mti hukwaruzana
senses.definition_dg: Phatu ambapo matawe mairi ga muhi ganagusana na kuswagana.

examples.dg: Ngogomwe wa muhi unasikira kpwa kure kuno upeho unapiga.
examples.en: The rubbing point of tree branches can be heard from far when the wind blows.
examples.sw: Sehemu ya mti ambapo matawi yanakwaruzana inasikika kwa mbali upepo unapovuma.

senses.definition_dg: Korodani; seemu ya mwiri ya chilume ya kuzaira.

examples.dg: Ngoko ni seemu ya mwiri ya siri.
examples.en: The testicle is a private body part.
examples.sw: Korodani ni sehemu ya siri ya mwili.

equivalents_en: wind instrument made from the horn of a cow or a goat

senses.definition_en: wind instrument made from the horn of a cow or a goat, played
senses.definition_dg: Chombo cha muziki cha kupigirwa kpwa kupuhirwa, chirichohendwa kpwa pembe ya ng'ombe au mbuzi.

examples.dg: Ngoli yapigwa wakati wa sherehe za chienyeji.
examples.en: The horn instrument was blown during traditional ceremonies.
examples.sw: Ngoli ilipigwa wakati wa sherehe za kienyeji.

sub_entries.definition_sw: aina ya chombo cha muziki kinachotokana na pembe ya ng'ombe au mbuzi

senses.definition_en: dance or ceremony in which drums are used, particularly involving spirit possession (in this sense ngoma is a kind of kayamba)
senses.definition_sw: ngoma ya kucheza ama kupunga pepo ambapo watu hutumia ngoma badala ya kayamba
senses.definition_dg: Ngoma ya kucheza ambapo atu anapigwa ni pepo, kuno ngoma zinahumirwa badala ya kayamba.

examples.dg: Ngoma ya pepo ichezwa usiku kucha.
examples.en: The spirit possession ceremony went on all night.
examples.sw: Ngoma ya pepo ilichezwa usiku kucha.

equivalents_en: ledge high on a cliff face

senses.definition_en: ledge high on a cliff face
senses.definition_dg: Phatu phenye mwamba dzulu phanaphotsamika, au nyumba ngumu ya kale.

examples.dg: Ngome ya kare inaonekana kutsi kpwenye jabali.
examples.en: The old fort is seen there on the cliff.
examples.sw: Ngome ya zamani inaonekana pale juu ya jabali.

senses.definition_dg: Kidudu kidide chinaingira ngozini mwa vidole vya magulu na kutaga mayo.

examples.dg: Ngondo zinatesa sana maguluni.
examples.en: Jiggers cause a lot of suffering in the feet.
examples.sw: Funza wanasumbua sana miguuni.

senses.definition_dg: Kuzimia, kupoteza achili kpwa muda mfupi.

examples.dg: Mchetu waanguka ngoro kpwa joto kali.
examples.en: The woman fainted because of the intense heat.
examples.sw: Mwanamke alizimia kwa joto kali.

senses.definition_en: , kusisa to breathe out heavily, to exhale
senses.definition_dg: Kupumua kpwa nguvu, kutulusa pumuzi kpwa nguvu.

examples.dg: Bada ya kuchimbira, wakala anasisa ngoro.
examples.en: After running, he was breathing out heavily.
examples.sw: Baada ya kukimbia, alikuwa anapumua kwa nguvu.

senses.definition_dg: Tunda ra mukorosho, renye ngozi ngumu na njere ndani.

examples.dg: Ngorosho za hipha ni nono sana.
examples.en: The cashew nuts from here are very good.
examples.sw: Korosho za hapa ni nzuri sana.

senses.definition_dg: Kuhenda sauti kpwa pula wakati wa kulala.

examples.dg: Baba anangorota sana asingizini.
examples.en: Father snores a lot in his sleep.
examples.sw: Baba anakoroma sana usingizini.

senses.definition_dg: Kukala na phepho, kusikira hali ya nyuzinyuzi.

examples.dg: Madzi ga muho ganamngota mutu anagoga.
examples.en: The river water makes the person bathing feel cold.
examples.sw: Maji ya mto yanampoza mtu anayeoga.

senses.definition_dg: Phatu pha kukunjika kpwa chala cha mkpwono.

examples.dg: Ngoto za mikpwono zinauma achikugomba sana.
examples.en: My knuckles hurt from writing a lot.
examples.sw: Vifundo vya vidole vinauma kwa kuandika sana.

senses.definition_dg: Mutu anayepatanisha pande mbiri au kurehera ujumbe kahi ya atu.

examples.dg: Ngudzi anatakikana wakati pande mbiri zinaika mapatano
examples.en: A mediator is needed when two parties make an agreement
examples.sw: Mshenga anatakikana wakati pande mbili zinafanya mapatano.

senses.definition_dg: Mutu anayeimba vinono, malenga.

examples.dg: Ngui iye ana sauti nono sana.
examples.en: That singer has a very beautiful voice.
examples.sw: Malenga huyo ana sauti nzuri sana.

senses.definition_dg: Chinyama cha tsakani chinaofanana na mutu, mkpwulu na chenye nguvu.

examples.dg: Nguli anaharibu mimea ya atu mundani.
examples.en: Baboons destroy people's crops in the garden.
examples.sw: Nyani wanaharibu mimea ya watu shambani.

senses.definition_dg: Aina ya samaki mkpwulu wa bahari wenye harufu kali.

examples.dg: Ngulu ni samaki mkpwulu anayegbwirwa baharini.
examples.en: The kingfish is a large fish caught in the sea.
examples.sw: Nguru ni samaki mkubwa anayevuliwa baharini.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kudziona bora kuriko atu anjine, kiburi.

examples.dg: Ngulu yake ndiyo inayomhenda akosane na atu.
examples.en: His arrogance is what makes him clash with people.
examples.sw: Kiburi chake ndicho kinachomfanya agombane na watu.

sub_entries.definition_en: to boast, to brag, to be proud

equivalents_en: type of plant: parasite in tree tops with bright red berries and

senses.definition_en: type of plant: parasite in tree tops with bright red berries and
senses.definition_dg: Aina ya muhi wa kuererera dzulu ya mihi yanjine wenye matunda ga kundu maridze.

examples.dg: Nguluchire inameya dzulu ya mihi mikpwulu.
examples.en: The nguluchire grows on top of large trees.
examples.sw: Nguluchire inakua juu ya miti mikubwa.

senses.definition_dg: Nguruwe wa tsakani, chinyama cha kuishi porini.

examples.dg: Nguluwe anaharibu mimea usiku.
examples.en: The bush pig destroys crops at night.
examples.sw: Nguruwe wa mwitu anaharibu mimea usiku.

senses.definition_en: glory, praise, fame (can be good or bad)
senses.definition_dg: Sifa, utukufu, kujulikana na atu anji.

examples.dg: Nguma ya mutu iye ikagota kpwosi.
examples.en: That person's fame has reached everywhere.
examples.sw: Sifa za mtu huyo zimefika kila mahali.

equivalents_en: person with one leg shorter than the other

senses.definition_en: person with one leg shorter than the other
senses.definition_dg: Mutu ambaye gulu mwenga ri fupi kuriko ranjine.

examples.dg: Ngunyu anaenyendeka kpwa shida.
examples.en: The person with uneven legs walks with difficulty.
examples.sw: Mtu aliye na mguu mmoja mfupi kuliko mwingine anatembea kwa shida.

senses.definition_dg: Kuhenda sauti kulu sana dza ya simba au ya radi.

examples.dg: Radi ikanguruma na anache achiogopa.
examples.en: Thunder rumbled and the children became scared.
examples.sw: Radi ilinguruma na watoto wakaogopa.

senses.definition_dg: Sauti kulu sana, dza ya radi au mnyama mkpwulu.

examples.dg: Ngurumo ya radi yasikirika mudzi-mudzi.
examples.en: The rumble of thunder was heard throughout the village.
examples.sw: Ngurumo ya radi ilisikika kijiji kizima.

senses.definition_dg: Kumiza chitu kpwa haraka bila kutafuna vinono.

examples.dg: Usinaguryuse chakurya, tafuna kpwandza.
examples.en: Don't gulp your food, chew first.
examples.sw: Usimeze chakula haraka, tafuna kwanza.

senses.definition_dg: Rangi isiyo kali, ya kufifia.

examples.dg: Nguwo iyo ni ya rangi ya ngushu-ngushu.
examples.en: That cloth is a pastel colour.
examples.sw: Nguo hiyo ni rangi ya kufifia.

senses.definition_dg: Uwezo wa kuhenda kazi ngumu, mkpwotse wa mwiri.

examples.dg: Ukahenda kazi na nguvu
examples.en: You have worked hard
examples.sw: Alifanya kazi kwa nguvu.

senses.definition_dg: Chitu cha kuvwalwa mwirini, nguo.

examples.dg: Fula nguwo za anache kula muhini.
examples.en: Take down the children's clothes from the line.
examples.sw: Toa nguo za watoto kutoka kwenye kamba.

senses.definition_en: pillar, center pole, strut (main roof support)
senses.definition_dg: Muhi mkpwulu wa kushikira nyumba, hasa wa kahi-kahi wa dari.

examples.dg: Nguzo ya nyumba ni lazima ikale ngumu.
examples.en: The pillar of the house must be strong.
examples.sw: Nguzo ya nyumba lazima iwe imara.
